name: Tech Review
description:
Welcome to Tech Review!
This channel is dedicated to Windows 11 and Windows 10 troubleshooting tutorials, error fixes, system settings solutions, and step-by-step PC problem solving videos.

On this channel, you will find:

Windows 11 error fixes

Windows 10 troubleshooting tutorials

Search bar, WiFi, sound, update, and activation fixes

System settings and startup problem solutions

Easy step-by-step PC repair guides

If you are facing Windows errors, missing settings, driver problems, or system issues, Tech Review helps you fix them quickly and easily.

Subscribe for regular Windows 11 and Windows 10 tutorials, troubleshooting guides, and tech solutions.

name: TechReviewPro
description:
TechReviewPro YouTube channel is the extended experience of the "TechReviewPro - The Pro Review of Technology" blog for tech geeks. Also known for Quality Tech Videos, Honest Tech Reviews, Pro-Tech Tutorials, and Pro Tech Reviews, TechReviewPro is often misspelled as "Pro Review",  "Tech Review Pro", "TechReviewPro India" and "Tech Review Pro Channel", etc. 

Subscribe to get the latest updates & detailed reviews along with how-to guides related to iOS, Apps, iPhones, iPads, Macs, and everything Apple.

TechReviewPro is a trusted tech publication that publishes useful stuff for Internet geeks. TechReviewPro serves free tips-tricks, tutorials & reviews related to Everything Apple, gadgets, software, and apps.

Started on the 1st of October, 2014, TechReviewPro has been named as one of the leading tech blogs in India with approx 1 Million page views.

Got a query?

name: GH Tech Review
description:
Welcome to my tech corner. I’m Gerardo, and I enjoy testing out tech and sharing my real experience with it. I cover everything from smartphones and laptops to monitors, gaming gear, smart home devices, and full PC builds, along with other cool tech that catches my interest.

I focus on clean, high-quality videos and honest thoughts based on my experience with the products.

If you’ve got questions, ideas, or something you’d like to see on the channel, feel free to reach out on my social channels. I’m always happy to connect.

Stick around for tech content that’s easy to follow and fun to watch.

name: GTR: Guiding Tech Reviews
description:
Premium Tech Videos. Brought to you by the same team behind Guiding Tech.

Guiding Tech Reviews (GTR) is an extension of the Guiding Tech YouTube Channel. While the original channel exists to provide you with the same content for making your tech life smarter and easier, GTR exists to help your tech purchases better. At GTR, we will be solely focused on device and purchase oriented videos, such as Reviews, Comparisons, and Buying Guides. 

Follow us on our social media handles for giveaway announcements!

name: Chaitanya Reviews
description:
My name is Srinivasa Chaithanya and I am from Hyderabad, India. On Chaitanya Reviews, I review tech, home and kitchen appliances like TVs, Laptops, ACs, Refrigerators, Washing machines, Water purifiers, Mattresses, etc.

I buy and test every product myself and I do not make sponsored videos or paid promotions. I always try to show clear pros and cons in simple language so you can choose what is right for your home.

My viewers are the most important part of this channel, and your support helps me keep improving my reviews.  When you buy using my affiliate links, your price stays the same, but it gives me small support to buy and test more products.

You can also read more detailed articles and buying guides on my website vsctimes.com. 

Business email: hello@vsctimes.com 

Please do not contact me for sponsored or paid promotion offers. I do accept products for review, but I will always share both pros and cons and the script and opinions will be mine.

name: IGN India
description:
A Fork Media Group Co.

About IGN India 

Welcome to IGN India's YouTube channel - your ultimate hub for gaming, movies, TV shows, comics, and everything in between. Our team of expert writers and creators bring you the latest news, reviews, and previews on the hottest video games, upcoming movies, and TV shows, along with in-depth analysis of the latest tech gadgets and gear.

 With exclusive interviews, deep dives into your favourite franchises, and coverage of the biggest events in entertainment and gaming, our content is tailored to cater to the needs of hardcore gamers, pop culture enthusiasts, and anyone looking for something to watch or read. 

Join our community of like-minded enthusiasts by subscribing to our channel, and let's explore the world of gaming and entertainment together. Whether you're a console gamer, PC enthusiast, or simply looking for the latest news and reviews, IGN India is the go-to channel for you.

name: Sayma Sunshine Fashion

name: Pranav
description:
Welcome to my channel! My name is Pranav. 

Based out of the hustling streets of Delhi & Mumbai, this channel is your go-to guide for everything stylish—from Old Money elegance to Streetwear swag, from laid-back casuals to sharp formal fits.

We break down the latest trends, style, and outfit inspirations that actually work on Indian streets.
With regular content on lifestyle, grooming, and real-world outfit and store reviews, this is more than just a fashion channel. It’s a vibe!

Subscribe and join the movement—where every fit tells a story, and every street becomes your runway.

Follow me on my social media to keep up with my journey!

name: Forever New India
description:
Discover a world of timeless elegance, sophistication, and chic fashion with Forever New – where every moment is an opportunity to shine. We believe that fashion is not just about clothing; it's an expression of your individuality, a celebration of your unique style, and a journey towards self-confidence. Established with a passion for creating exquisite and enduring collections, we've been curating the finest in women's fashion since 2006. 

Our collections are a harmonious blend of classic aesthetics and contemporary trends, designed to empower women to feel confident, glamorous, and effortlessly stylish. Whether you're dressing up for a special occasion, embracing everyday elegance, or seeking the perfect ensemble to make a statement, Forever New has you covered.

name: Dr. Akriti Khatri : Motivational Speaker
description:
DR. Akriti Khatri is a multi-talented entrepreneur and the owner of Female Detective agency, a private investigation agency based in India. She is also a business coach, relationship consultant, and motivational speaker.
 As a business coach, DR. Akriti helps entrepreneurs and business owners develop and implement effective strategies to improve their operations and achieve their goals. 
 As a relationship consultant, DR. Akriti offers practical advice, coaching, and support to help clients build healthy and fulfilling relationships. 
 As a motivational speaker, DR. Akriti shares her personal story of triumph over adversity and offers practical strategies for success. She inspires and motivates audiences with her message of resilience, determination, and hard work.
 Akriti's unique combination of skills and experience enables her to provide a comprehensive approach to helping clients achieve their goals and improve their personal and professional lives.

name: Learn PLC in Hindi
description:
Hello People =)

I am Rajvir Singh, working as Development Engineer in Germany. From last few months i was getting numerous requests on my first YouTube Channel - (www.youtube.com/thegeterrdone) to start making tutorials in Hindi. So I started this new channel - Learn PLC in Hindi.

The tutorials are not only on PLC but on basic industrial control and PLC fundamentals. All tutorials are mixed in Hindi and English or you call it 'Hinglish'. I am using the old school way of teaching i.e My favorite style - BlackBoard and Chalk.

Hope you will love the channel. Have a great day :)
P.S: If you want to check out my tutorials in English you can visit my other channel at http://www.youtube.com/thegeterrdone
